summary: Tier 1: strip {p. N} brace scan markers + plate/figure captions + re-chunk/re-embed
description:
Tier 1 (cont.): strip scan artifacts — {p. N} brace page markers and plate/figure captions.

Patterns:
- \{\s*p\.\s*\d+\s*\}   — brace page markers (121 local chunks). SAFE to strip.
  Do NOT strip bare "p. N" (no braces) — caveat #2: it can be a legitimate
  citation reference.
- Plate/figure/scan apparatus: "click to enlarge", \bPlate\s+[IVXLC\d], \bFig\.
  (~110 in live v27) — image captions from the scans.

Add to pre_strip_patterns of affected configs (concentrated in egyptian — the
scan-heavy Budge volumes — plus others surfaced by the scan). Re-chunk + re-embed
affected (same refresh sequence as C1).

Done contract:
- 0 chunk bodies contain the {p. N} brace form; plate/figure caption fragments gone.
- Bare "p. N" citations preserved (spot-check a few).
- Round-trip green; embeddings refreshed.
- Regression test: assert no chunk body matches \{\s*p\.\s*\d+\s*\}.
